name: Sunsoft
description: Game brand of Sun Corporation, known for technically strong NES games like Blaster Master, Batman, Gimmick!, and Ufouria.

eras.title: Electronics and Arcade Origins
eras.description: Sun Corporation's pre-console period, moving from electronics into arcade games.

eras.title: NES/Famicom Cult Era
eras.description: Sunsoft's strongest creative period, marked by technically impressive NES and Famicom games.

eras.title: Decline and Dormancy
eras.description: Reduced international presence and long periods of inactivity around the Sunsoft brand.

eras.title: Retro Revival
eras.description: Modern revival of the Sunsoft catalogue through collections, sequels, and re-releases.

notes: Sunsoft is best treated as the game-development brand of Sun Corporation rather than a separate independent company.
